title: Foo Bar Topic Misconfiguration
description: Fix a misconfigured Kafka topic that causes consumer rebalance storms. The topic has a single partition with high throughput; consumers cannot parallelize and lag grows. Correct the partition count and replication factor.

tasks.description: Reconfigure the orders topic with appropriate partition count and replication factor so consumers can scale.

infrastructure.description: Redpanda with orders topic (1 partition, replication 1). Consumer writes to analytics.orders. High lag due to single-partition bottleneck.
